steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage structures three separate viewpoints—from mother Haesu, father Chun, and daughter Faye—as “The first section... the second... the last,” emphasizing they are different perspectives.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Distinct” means clearly different or separate. The other three all fail: “required” invokes necessity, “unknown” contradicts the identified sources, and “unintended” suggests accident rather than intentional design. That matches choice D — D is correct.
